failed_attempts:
have h_main : False := by
    have h₂ := h₁ 1 (by norm_num)
    have h₃ := h₁ 2 (by norm_num)
    have h₄ := h₁ 3 (by norm_num)
    have h₅ := h₁ 4 (by norm_num)
    norm_num at h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅
    <;>
    (try contradiction) <;>
    (try linarith) <;>
    (try
      {
        have h₆ := h₁ 0.5 (by norm_num)
        norm_num at h₆
        <;> linarith
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        have h₆ := h₁ (-1)
        have h₇ := h₁ (-2)
        norm_num at h₆ h₇
        <;> linarith
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        have h₆ := h₁ 1 (by norm_num)
        have h₇ := h₁ 2 (by norm_num)
        have h₈ := h₁ 3 (by norm_num)
        have h₉ := h₁ 4 (by norm_num)
        norm_num at h₆ h₇ h₈ h₉
        <;> linarith
      })
  
  have h_absurd : (∀ (w x y z : ℝ), 0 < w → 0 < x → 0 < y → 0 < z → w * x = y * z → (f w ^ 2 + f x ^ 2) / (f (y ^ 2) + f (z ^ 2)) = (w ^ 2 + x ^ 2) / (y ^ 2 + z ^ 2)) ↔ (∀ x > 0, f x = x) ∨ ∀ x > 0, f x = 1 / x := by
    exfalso
    exact h_main
  
  simpa [answer] using h_absurd

intro w x y z hw hx hy hz h_eq
      cases h with
      | inl h =>
        -- Case: f(x) = x for all x > 0
        have h₃ : ∀ x > 0, f x = x := h
        have h₄ : (f w ^ 2 + f x ^ 2) / (f (y ^ 2) + f (z ^ 2)) = (w ^ 2 + x ^ 2) / (y ^ 2 + z ^ 2) := by
          have h₅ : f w = w := h₃ w hw
          have h₆ : f x = x := h₃ x hx
          have h₇ : f (y ^ 2) = y ^ 2 := h₃ (y ^ 2) (by positivity)
          have h₈ : f (z ^ 2) = z ^ 2 := h₃ (z ^ 2) (by positivity)
          rw [h₅, h₆, h₇, h₈]
          <;> field_simp [pow_two]
          <;> ring
          <;> field_simp [pow_two]
          <;> nlinarith [hw, hx, hy, hz]
        exact h₄
      | inr h =>
        -- Case: f(x) = 1/x for all x > 0
        have h₃ : ∀ x > 0, f x = 1 / x := h
        have h₄ : (f w ^ 2 + f x ^ 2) / (f (y ^ 2) + f (z ^ 2)) = (w ^ 2 + x ^ 2) / (y ^ 2 + z ^ 2) := by
          have h₅ : f w = 1 / w := h₃ w hw
          have h₆ : f x = 1 / x := h₃ x hx
          have h₇ : f (y ^ 2) = 1 / (y ^ 2) := h₃ (y ^ 2) (by positivity)
          have h₈ : f (z ^ 2) = 1 / (z ^ 2) := h₃ (z ^ 2) (by positivity)
          rw [h₅, h₆, h₇, h₈]
          have h₉ : 0 < w * x := mul_pos hw hx
          have h₁₀ : 0 < y * z := mul_pos hy hz
          have h₁₁ : w * x = y * z := h_eq
          field_simp [pow_two]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp [h₁₁]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> nlinarith [hw, hx, hy, hz]
        exact h₄
    exact h₂
